hero.title: We help you build a complete digital presence that sells
hero.description: From social media and paid advertising to Google reviews and websites – everything from a single source to tangibly increase your revenue.

courses.sectionSubtitle: From beginner to advanced – find the right path.
courses.footerText: These levels are important for training, university studies, or working in Germany.

items.title: German A1
items.description: Basic language skills for everyday life and initial contact.

items.title: German A2
items.description: Expanding vocabulary for work and simple texts.

items.title: German B1
items.description: Language level required for training and university studies in Germany.

items.title: German B2
items.description: Understand complex topics and communicate fluently.

steps.sectionTitle: Start your digital growth in 3 steps
steps.sectionSubtitle: Our workflow is completely transparent, fast, and specifically tailored to your company's situation.

items.title: Free Consultation
items.description: Contact us. In a brief, free conversation, we will clarify your current situation (social media, Google Maps) and your goals.

items.title: Choose Your Package
items.description: We will suggest the right package according to your budget and goals – from our packages (Start, Growth, Reviews, Full Package).

items.title: Launch and Support
items.description: We begin the implementation, and every month you will receive clear reports with real results and sales figures.

why.sectionSubtitle: Modern marketing strategies with personalized support, full transparency, and expertise in the local market.

items.title: Real Results
items.description: No fake numbers, no bought followers – just real, sustainable growth through well-thought-out strategies that protect your account.

items.title: Local Market Knowledge
items.description: We know the behavior, language, and active times of Moroccan and Arab consumers – for campaigns that reach your target audience precisely.

items.title: Full Transparency
items.description: Every month you receive clear reports: new followers, interaction rates, reviews, and customers who found you through the campaign.

items.title: Policy Compliant
items.description: We use officially recognized methods from Google, Meta, and TikTok – for long-term stability without the risk of sudden account suspension.

items.title: Individual Strategy
items.description: No off-the-shelf templates: We analyze your company, your competition, and your target group to develop a tailor-made marketing plan.

items.title: Direct Contact
items.description: You are not alone: direct contact with our team for questions, ideas, and adjustments – we are part of your team, not an external service provider.

services.sectionSubtitle: Everything that makes your business digitally successful – from websites to community growth, all from a single source.

items.title: Social Media Management
items.description: We fully manage your Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok presence — content creation, editorial planning, and organic growth for more followers, likes, and views.

items.title: Paid Advertising (Ads)
items.description: Targeted ad campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Google Ads — for maximum reach and measurable results.

items.title: Professional Websites
items.description: Modern, fast, and mobile-optimized websites for your business — from design to publication in 7–14 days. Includes basic SEO optimization.

items.title: Google Review Building
items.description: We help you collect more genuine Google reviews and sustainably increase your local visibility on Google Maps.

contact.sectionSubtitle: Do you have questions or want to grow your business digitally? Send us a message directly.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Together on the path to digital growth – with professional marketing, personal support, and a clear strategy for your business.

cards.title: Who we are
cards.text: Afaq Digital is a modern marketing agency that accompanies businesses on their journey to greater digital visibility. With well-thought-out strategies for websites, advertisements, and social media, we support our clients in appearing online securely and confidently. Our work combines modern marketing methods with personalized support and practical results. In doing so, we create a transparent collaboration where sustainable growth and individual support are at the center.

cards.title: Our Mission
cards.text: Our mission is to position businesses digitally optimal for the local market. We don't just want to provide our clients with more visibility, but also give them the confidence to attract new customers and achieve their business goals. Through experienced experts and modern marketing concepts, we accompany every step of the growth process.

cards.title: Websites, Advertising and Branding
cards.text: The digital market offers numerous opportunities for visibility, customer acquisition, and business development. That is why we specifically support our clients in meeting the necessary digital requirements for the next step. Whether it is a website, an advertising campaign, or branding – we help you expand your reach and successfully arrive in the digital market.

cards.title: Our Vision
cards.text: Our vision is to open up new future opportunities for businesses through digital marketing. We believe that a strong online presence forms the basis for successful growth, customer trust, and business success. With passion, quality, and innovation, we want to make a long-term positive contribution to the success of our clients.

items.title: 1. Scope
items.text: These Terms and Conditions apply to all services provided by Mediaweg Digital Agency.

items.title: 2. Services
items.text: Mediaweg Digital Agency provides services in web design, web development, search engine optimization (SEO), branding, graphic design, social media marketing, and digital marketing.

items.title: 3. Contract Formation
items.text: A contract is concluded upon written confirmation of a quotation, via email, WhatsApp, or through the contact form on the website.

items.title: 4. Prices and Payment
items.text: The fees for the agreed services are determined before the project begins. Payments are made according to the payment terms specified in the quotation or contract.

items.title: 5. Cancellation
items.text: A project may be canceled before work has started. Services already performed or costs already incurred will be charged accordingly.

items.title: 6. Project Execution
items.text: The client agrees to provide all information and materials necessary for the project in a timely manner. Delays caused by missing client input may result in adjustments to the project schedule.

items.title: 7. Liability
items.text: Mediaweg Digital Agency is not liable for outages or damages beyond its control, including issues caused by hosting providers, third-party services, or technical failures.

items.title: 8. Governing Law
items.text: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Morocco. The place of jurisdiction is Salé, Morocco.

items.title: 1. General Information
items.text: Protecting your personal data is important to us. We process your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the applicable data protection laws of the Kingdom of Morocco.

items.title: 3. Collection and Processing of Personal Data
items.text: When you contact us through the contact form, we may process the following information:
items.footer: This information is used solely to process your inquiry and provide our services.

items.title: 4. Use of WhatsApp
items.text: Our website includes a WhatsApp button. When you click it, you will be redirected to WhatsApp. Personal data may be processed by WhatsApp in accordance with its own privacy policy.

items.title: 5. Data Retention
items.text: Your personal data will only be stored for as long as necessary to process your inquiry, fulfill contractual obligations, or comply with legal retention requirements.

items.title: 6. Your Rights
list: Request access to your stored personal data
Request deletion of your personal data
items.footer: If you have any questions regarding data protection, you can contact us at any time.

items.title: Notice
items.text: Mediaweg Digital Agency is a digital agency based in Morocco, providing services in web design, web development, SEO, branding, graphic design, and digital marketing.
